name: Cinnamon Walnut Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Grease and flour a baking sheet.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, 1 cup sugar, baking soda, baking powder, and salt until well blended.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the remaining eggs, egg yolk, vanilla extract, and orange zest.
5. Add the egg mixture to the flour mixture; continue beating until a soft dough forms.
6. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface. Fold in the chopped walnuts, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
7. Divide the dough into two equal pieces.
8. On the baking sheet, shape each piece of dough into a 2 1/2 x 10-inch loaf. Space loaves about 3 inches apart.
9. Brush each loaf with an egg mixture (remaining egg and water) and sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon mix.
10. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes or until lightly browned.
11. Cool the loaves on the baking sheet for 10 minutes.
12. Cut the loaves diagonally into 1/2 inch slices.
13. Place the sliced cookies flat on a baking sheet.
14. Bake for an additional 15 minutes, then turn and bake for another 15 minutes longer.
15. Transfer the cooled cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
16. Store in an airtight container.
Makes about 2 1/2 dozen biscotti.
